resources.string: Messages remain usable and readable in AuroraSMS, but background and new-message alerts are off while notifications are disabled.
AuroraSMS is not the default SMS app. Android pauses message-history access until you explicitly approve AuroraSMS.
Waiting for the Android role decision.
AuroraSMS is the current default SMS app.
The role request was cancelled. Your current SMS app remains unchanged, and AuroraSMS history sync stays paused.
This device does not report SMS telephony support.
This Android build does not report the required messaging capability.
Android does not currently offer the SMS role on this device.
Appended with a visible \u002d\u002d separator. The exact SMS-part or MMS impact appears in the composer before send.
Signature was not changed because local storage was unavailable.
Choose an unambiguous local time at least two minutes from now.
Android’s exact-alarm settings are unavailable. The message will keep its honest inexact schedule.
AuroraSMS controls, all local to this device.
Theme Studio, colors, message bubbles, density, and wallpapers.
Review local spam decisions and blocked conversations.
Create or restore an encrypted, user-controlled SMS/MMS archive.
AuroraSMS has no account or cloud backup. Only files you explicitly create can leave the app sandbox.
Encrypted, explicit, and entirely under your control.
Exports SMS, MMS metadata, and MMS attachments to one file you choose. Private app settings, drafts, schedules, spam decisions, and wallpapers are excluded.
Copies one selected archive into private temporary storage, authenticates every byte, then shows a summary before any message can be restored.
AuroraSMS does not enable Android or cloud backup. It never uploads these files and has no account, recovery key, or passphrase escrow.
Use 12–1024 characters. There is no password recovery: losing this passphrase permanently loses access to the archive.
Use at least 12 non-control characters and enter the same passphrase twice.
Enter the archive passphrase. AuroraSMS cannot distinguish a wrong passphrase from a damaged or changed encrypted file.
The passphrase is wrong or the encrypted file is damaged. Nothing was restored.
This backup version is not supported by this AuroraSMS build.
The backup exceeds AuroraSMS’s reviewed safety limits.
The file authenticated but is not a valid AuroraSMS message archive.
The selected backup could not be authenticated on this device.
Exact messages already present are skipped. Existing messages are never overwritten.
Draft, outbox, queued, and failed archive rows restore only as failed historical messages. Restore never sends or schedules them.
Keep AuroraSMS open until this operation finishes.
The encrypted archive was closed successfully at your chosen destination.
The document provider would not remove its incomplete destination. Delete that file manually before retrying.
AuroraSMS could not prove complete rollback. Do not retry until the recovery warning clears.
A previous restore needs safe recovery. Message restore remains blocked; keep AuroraSMS as the default SMS app and reopen this screen.
No archive can be created or restored until startup recovery and private temporary-file cleanup both succeed. Fully close and reopen AuroraSMS before trying again.
Android returned an invalid backup destination.
AuroraSMS must remain the default SMS app for this operation.
SMS read permission is required for this operation.
Android’s message provider could not create a stable backup snapshot.
Message history exceeds AuroraSMS’s reviewed archive limits.
This device could not provide the required backup encryption.
Android’s message provider changed or failed while the archive was being read.
The selected document could not be written completely.
Android returned an invalid restore source.
The selected backup document could not be opened.
The backup source became unavailable before the operation completed.
Private temporary storage is unavailable. Nothing was restored.
Android could not safely compare this archive with existing messages.
AuroraSMS could not create its private crash-recovery journal.
Android’s message provider rejected the verified restore.
A provider row changed during restore. AuroraSMS stopped instead of touching uncertain data.
Restore stopped and exact cleanup could not be proven.
Creates a new profile from the selected appearance when you apply.
AuroraSMS supports up to 32 named appearance profiles. Delete one before creating another.
On supported Android versions, System Dynamic colors come from Android. Older versions use Aurora’s local fallback. Hue is unavailable for this palette.
Uses stronger surface and outline contrast.
Classic navigation remains active until bottom-bar and adaptive-rail route parity is verified.
Default values are previewed. Apply to save them, or Cancel to keep the active profile.
This removes the saved profile. Your messages and drafts are not affected.
Appearance could not be saved. Your preview is still available.
The saved profile could not be deleted.
This profile changed elsewhere. Reload it before applying.
A saved profile already uses that name.
This changes appearance only. Messages, drafts, and sending are unaffected.
This appearance assignment could not be saved.
This assignment changed elsewhere. Close and reopen it before applying.
That saved profile is no longer available.
Apply or cancel profile changes before editing the wallpaper.
Choose an 8-bit baseline JPEG or a supported static PNG for this thread scope. AuroraSMS previews it without saving and stores only a private sanitized copy when you apply.
The saved wallpaper is unavailable. Choose another image or reset this assignment.
Horizontal focal point %1$d%%, vertical focal point %2$d%%, dim %3$d%%
That image could not be read. Choose another supported image.
That image format is not supported. AuroraSMS accepts 8-bit baseline JPEG and supported static PNG files.
That image is too large to process safely. Choose a smaller image.
Wallpaper storage is full. Reset an unused wallpaper before adding another.
This wallpaper changed elsewhere. Go back and reopen it before applying.
The wallpaper could not be saved. Your staged preview is still available.
